abstract: This 2025 Italian-language work, titled 'Manipolazione dei media ed influenza digitale. Sfide, tecnologie e risposte' (Media Manipulation and Digital Influence: Challenges, Technologies and Responses), appears to address the contemporary problem of media manipulation and digital influence operations. Based solely on the title, the paper likely examines the challenges posed by manipulated media, the technologies involved in both perpetrating and detecting such manipulation, and possible countermeasures. No abstract or further detail was provided, so the specific arguments, methods, and findings cannot be summarised here.

findings: Findings cannot be determined as no abstract or full text was provided.
contributions: Based on the title alone, the work appears intended to contribute to discussions of media manipulation, digital influence operations, and technological and policy responses, but specific contributions cannot be verified without the source text.
framing: The title situates the work within debates on digital media, disinformation, and information security, likely engaging with the intersection of communication studies, technology, and policy responses to online manipulation. Without an abstract, the precise disciplinary framing cannot be confirmed.
